# Syslog Fixtures

Capture syslog samples without secrets, usernames, public IPs, serial numbers, or internal site names. Prefer one event per object with expected classification labels.

The included samples are synthetic but modeled after common operational messages from MikroTik, Fortinet, Ubiquiti, and Linux SSH.

Fortinet/FortiGate profile fixtures live in `fortinet/` and validate key/value
normalization, security classification, and selective alert behavior.
